title: Billa
desc: Billa, a notorious gangster, is fatally wounded during an encounter with the police. The police commissioner decides to secretly replace him with a lookalike to help catch his gang.

title: Aayiram Vilakku
desc: When Gopal is taken in by Lingam, a notorious ageing gangster, he becomes entangled in a violent world of gang rivalries and must fight to protect his new family from deadly enemies.

title: Mitta Miraasu
desc: Chellaiya is hell-bent on taking revenge on his uncle Masilamani and his two sons for backstabbing his father. However, things are not as easy as it seems.

title: Soora Samhaaram
desc: Pandian, a police officer, sets out to take revenge on a drug lord for the murder of his best friend, Arun. However, Pandian gets abducted by the criminal and is forced into drug addiction.

title: Samudhram
desc: Three brothers are ready to do anything for their sister. When she gets married to the son of a man seeking revenge from their family, the brothers lose their wealth and get humiliated at his hands.
